title: Read-only public explorer (source + evidence on every edge; 'not medical advice' banner)
context: A read-only public explorer allows researchers and educators to browse the knowledge graph without needing to load graph files. Every edge must show its source, evidence level, and 'as-of' source version so users can trace assertions back to the primary literature. The explorer must carry a standing 'For research and education only - not medical advice' banner on every view and collect no visitor PII. Depends on exports (oncogene-kg-export-001).
objective: Build and deploy a read-only public explorer backed by the graph exports that shows gene/variant/drug/pathway/disease associations with per-edge source, evidence level, and as-of source version, with a mandatory research-use disclaimer banner, no account required, and no visitor PII collected.
acceptanceCriteria: Users can browse a gene or variant and see linked drugs, pathways, and diseases with every assertion's source, evidence level, and as-of source version.
Standing 'For research and education only - not medical advice' banner appears on every view with no way to dismiss it permanently.
Explorer is static or server-rendered with no user accounts and collects no visitor PII.
Links to raw export files are prominent on every page.
Passes the scope-firewall policy requirements from oncogene-kg-firewall-001.
output: explorer/ directory with the read-only explorer application code and deployment config, committed via PR with CI green and a live deployment URL.
